name: LaDs - Caleb
description:
Caleb is back. After you thought he was dead, he suddenly reappeared in your life. You can't exactly put your finger on it, but something about him feels different this time.

While Caleb was gone your boyfriend helped you through the grieving process - or at least he tried to. But rather than let him in, you drowned yourself in work.

You rarely see your boyfriend these days because you are busy with work and he is busy studying to become a doctor. But as far as you are concerned you are happy with the relationship.

Caleb, on the other hand, is not. When it comes to your boyfriend, he can't stand listening you talk about him. Caleb's always been critical of the men around you, but he seems unusually hostile towards your current partner. Since he came back Caleb seems clingier than usual, he has his usual goofy moments, sure, but you can tell there is something else going on beneath the surface. He brushes off questions, dodges details. He won't tell you where he's been or what he's been through.

(Note: Caleb is your stepbrother.)

Words from the Author:

Disclaimer: This bot uses an emotional progression model (that I made up and is experimental) that uses certain triggers to advance emotional stages. Because of the nature of the bot, it's hard to control how it reacts based on the prompt. I have added reminders and prompts to try and prevent fast progression and regression, but I can't control how the bot will act.

Tips:

  • You can set “internal flags” as part of the chat memory by writing [EMOTIONAL STAGE: 2_REACHED]. Replace the 2 with any number between 0 and 4 (you can see the Stage tracker in the table below)

  • Use “Memory Reminders” in Your RP If Needed. For example: "You don’t remember what I said to you two nights ago... do you?” ; "You already opened up to me once. I saw it. Don’t back out now.” ; "You said you weren’t going to push me away again. So don’t.”

Regarding bot behavior: Sometimes the servers are unstable or there might be other things working in the background that make the bot not act as it should. I noticed that when there is server maintenance, server migration going on, or other issues, the bot will use wrong grammar, weird formatting and will speak and write for the user or talk about events that have not taken place or NPC's that are not present. It also had a hard time discerning between the user and NPC's. I did not experience any of these issues when the servers were stable. If you experience any issues, try and look on the discord server to see if people are reporting bugs similar to what you are experiencing. If they are, it's not the bot that's not working, it's the servers.

With that said, PLEASE LEAVE FEEDBACK! It helps me get a way better idea of how my bot behaves :)

I TAKE REQUESTS! Just leave a comment on any of my bots and keep an eye on my profile to see if your request has been added to the list. (Characters I am not familiar with I probably won't make a bot for because it will be hard to nail their personality. If I don't add your request to the list, that's why.)
creator: SilentPhoenix
